findings.issue: The draft includes a §4.3 derivative-quotient formula that the brief explicitly put on the 刻意不寫 list for §4.2.
findings.evidence: The sentence says §4.3 will estimate `\((e^{h} - 1)/h\)`. The direction brief forbids the difference-quotient/`(e^h-1)/h` material in this section except for a generic one-line forward fence to §4.3.
findings.suggestion: Remove the displayed quotient reference and keep only a generic forward fence such as saying that the derivative is the subject of §4.3.

summary: The main §4.2 mathematics checks out: Theorems 4.3–4.7, Proposition 4.1, and Corollary 4.1 follow the seed/brief structure. Convergence is blocked only by the forbidden §4.3 quotient reference in the closing forward fence.
